content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive view of the project. Let me create a detailed summary: ## Project Exploration Summary ### 1. **Project Type & Tech Stack** This is a **Warcraft III UI Component Library** - an interactive showcase/demo application for Warcraft III-inspired UI components built with **React** and **TypeScript**. **Tech Stack:** - **Frontend Framework:** React 19.2.4 - **Build Tool:** Vite 6.0.0 with React plugin - **Language:** TypeScript 5.7.0 - **Styling:** CSS (custom stylesheets with Warcraft III theming) - **3D/Graphics:** WebGL renderer with gl-matrix 3.4.3 - **Game Model Support:** war3-model 4.0.0 (handles Warcraft III model files - BLP textures, MDL models) - **Runtime:** ES modules (type: "module" in package.json) ### 2. **Build/Lint/Test Commands** From `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/package.json`: ```json "scripts": { "dev": "vite", "build": "vite build", "preview": "vite preview" } ``` **Available commands:** - `npm run dev` - Start dev server (runs on port 3000) - `npm run build` - Create optimized production build - `npm run preview` - Preview the production build **No lint or test scripts defined** - no ESLint, Prettier, or test framework configured. ### 3. **High-Level Architecture** **Data Flow:** 1. **Entry Point:** `src/index.tsx` → mounts React app at `#root` in `index.html` 2. **Root Component:** `src/App.tsx` - massive component (~175KB) that orchestrates the entire UI showcase 3. **State Management:** Custom external store pattern in `src/state/createStore.ts` using `React.useSyncExternalStore` - `src/state/race.ts` - tracks current faction/race (Human, Orc, Night Elf, Undead) - `src/state/resources.ts` - manages gold, lumber, supply values - `src/state/ui.ts` - UI state management 4. **Renderer:** WebGL-based custom renderer (`src/renderer/`) for rendering Warcraft III-style graphics **Key Component Categories:** - **UI Components** (`src/components/`): - Form controls: `Checkbox.tsx`, `RadioButton.tsx`, `Slider.tsx`, `EditBox.tsx` - Display: `TopHud.tsx`, `BottomHud.tsx`, `StatBar.tsx`, `LoadingBar.tsx` - Interactive: `MenuButton.tsx`, `MenuPanel.tsx`, `Tooltip.tsx` - 3D Models: `HeroPortraitModel.tsx`, `WorkerUnitModel.tsx`, `TimeIndicatorModel.tsx` - Special: `CursorOverlay.tsx`, `HeroGallery.tsx` - **Section Components** (`src/components/sections/`) - showcase/demo sections: - `HeroSection.tsx` - landing section - `ButtonsSection.tsx`, `ControlsSection.tsx`, `BarsSection.tsx` - `FactionPreviewSection.tsx`, `BordersSection.tsx`, `IconsSection.tsx`, `PanelsSection.tsx` - `DesignTokensSection.tsx`, `AccessibilitySection.tsx`, `BundleSizeSection.tsx` - `FAQSection.tsx`, `FooterSection.tsx` - **Renderer Layer** (`src/renderer/`): - `Renderer.ts` - main WebGL renderer with element registry system - `GLContext.ts` - WebGL context management - `TextureManager.ts` & `textures.ts` - handle game textures (BLP format) - `QuadBatcher.ts` - batches quad rendering - `BlendManager.ts` - blend mode management - `NineSlice.ts` - 9-slice scaling implementation - `shaders.ts` - WebGL shaders - **Data** (`src/data/`): - `borderManifest.ts` - UI border definitions - **Types** (`src/lib/types.ts`): - `Race` type: 'Human' | 'Orc' | 'NightElf' | 'Undead' - `RacePrefix` interface for locale/display variations ### 4. **Configuration Files** **`vite.config.ts`:** ```typescript - React plugin enabled - Dev server on port 3000 - Build target: ESNext ``` **`tsconfig.json`:** - Strict mode enabled - Target: ESNext, Module: ESNext - JSX: react-jsx - No emit (development only) - Isolated modules for faster compilation **`index.html`:** - Standard entry point with `
` - Loads React app from `/src/index.tsx` - Title: "Warcraft III — UI Component Library" **`.gitignore`:** - Standard Node.js ignores (node_modules, dist) - Temp files (`.tmp-*`, `tmp-*.png`, `tmp-*.mdl`) - Build artifacts and backup files ### 5. **Documentation & Rules** No documentation files found: - **No README.md** at root - **No CLAUDE.md** (deleted according to git status) - **No .cursorrules** or `.github/copilot-instructions.md` - **No `.github/` directory at all** There is a `.claude/settings.local.json` file (Claude local settings), but main docs don't exist. ### 6. **Source Directory Structure** ``` src/ ├── App.tsx (175KB main app component) ├── index.tsx (React entry point) ├── global.css (45KB global styles - Warcraft III themed) ├── showcase-tooltip-center.css (small utility styles) ├── components/ │ ├── [UI Components] (Checkbox, EditBox, TopHud, etc.) │ └── sections/ (Showcase sections) ├── data/ │ └── borderManifest.ts (UI border definitions) ├── lib/ │ └── types.ts (TypeScript type definitions) ├── renderer/ (WebGL rendering system) │ ├── Renderer.ts │ ├── GLContext.ts │ ├── TextureManager.ts │ ├── textures.ts │ ├── QuadBatcher.ts │ ├── BlendManager.ts │ ├── NineSlice.ts │ └── shaders.ts └── state/ (State management stores) ├── createStore.ts ├── race.ts ├── resources.ts └── ui.ts ``` ### Key Files by Purpose: - **Entry Points:** `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/src/index.tsx`, `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/src/App.tsx` - **Config:** `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/vite.config.ts`, `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/tsconfig.json` - **Styling:** `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/src/global.css` - **State:** `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/src/state/createStore.ts` - **Renderer:** `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/src/renderer/Renderer.ts` - **Component Library:** `/home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/src/components/` (30+ components)
